历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021-2023) was approximately 3403 → 21409 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 5708 → 2903 → 3723. In recent two years, the ranking fluctuated between 2900 and 3700, with a baseline of about 3723 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category was 176 in 2021, 177 in 2022, 179 in 2023, 179 in 2024, and 180 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 234, an expansion of about 30% compared to 2025, which is substantial and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranked 27th on the main list, with a stable ranking between 23 and 27 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to the former president being investigated for serious disciplinary violations, which may have a minor negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with low short video exposure. In 2024, there was a signal of admission score gap (medium attention), and in 2025, the underground space engineering major in Chongqing experienced a gap, but the overall impact is limited. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting strong interest from candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are also recommended, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines. Majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Gansu Province general college entrance examination is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to the total of about 179,817 for Physics and History categories in 2025, intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Gansu candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 2.3% (2025), which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3723, the significant 30% expansion of the Physics Category plan in 2026, the approximately 21.6% increase in Gansu candidate numbers, and the slightly negative university reputation, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, but the negative reputation and candidate increase partially offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 4363, with a range of 3863 to 4863.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3863 to 4863, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3863), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, and Computer Science. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (4000-4500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, and Transportation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4800), you should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering relatively easier majors like Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceuticals, and Surveying and Mapping.
